title: B1 Listening Part 1 - Test 41
instructions: For each question, listen to the short recording and choose the correct picture: A, B or C.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about a lost water bottle.
questions.audio_script: Woman: Did you find your water bottle? You sounded worried this morning. || Man: Yes, but not where I expected. I went back to the sports field, because I remembered drinking from it during practice. || Woman: And did you check the school bus? You were there later. || Man: I did, but it was not there. Then my coach called and said [1]my water bottle was on the reception desk[/1]. I must have left it there without thinking. || Woman: Good. You would need it today. || Man: Exactly, so I will collect it soon.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Did you find your water bottle? You sounded worried this morning.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Yes, but not where I expected. I went back to the sports field, because I remembered drinking from it during practice.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: And did you check the school bus? You were there later.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I did, but it was not there. Then my coach called and said my water bottle was on the reception desk. I must have left it there without thinking.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Good. You would need it today.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Exactly, so I will collect it soon.

questions.question: Where is the water bottle?

A.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, water bottle on a reception desk, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

B.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, water bottle on a sports field bench, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

C.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, water bottle on a bus seat, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

questions.explanation: The speaker says my water bottle was on the reception desk.

questions.context: You hear two friends making plans for the afternoon.
questions.audio_script: Man: Are we still going to go to the outdoor concert this afternoon? I was looking forward to it. || Woman: I don't think so. The band has cancelled, so that plan will not work. || Man: We could watch a film instead. || Woman: I checked, but there are no seats left. My cousin suggested another idea, and [1]we are visiting a pottery workshop after school[/1]. || Man: That sounds fine. What time shall we meet? || Woman: Let's meet at four outside the station, and we can go together.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I checked, but there are no seats left. My cousin suggested another idea, and we are visiting a pottery workshop after school.

dialogue.text: That sounds fine. What time shall we meet?

questions.context: You hear two students talking about the school camping night.
questions.audio_script: Girl: What do we need to take for the school camping night tomorrow? I don't want to carry too much. || Boy: The teacher said we do not need to bring a towel, because they have enough for everybody. || Girl: What about a notebook? || Boy: No, not this time. The important thing is this: [1]bring a torch because the path to the tents gets dark early[/1]. || Girl: Thanks. I will put it in my bag tonight. || Boy: Good idea. We have to leave early, so do not forget it.

dialogue.text: What do we need to take for the school camping night tomorrow? I don't want to carry too much.

dialogue.speaker: boy

dialogue.speaker: girl

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: No, not this time. The important thing is this: bring a torch because the path to the tents gets dark early.

dialogue.speaker: girl

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: Good idea. We have to leave early, so do not forget it.

questions.context: You hear two people choosing food in a café.
questions.audio_script: Boy: Have you decided what to get for lunch? The queue is moving quickly. || Girl: I first thought about chicken soup, but I had that yesterday. || Boy: The cheese sandwich looks good too. || Girl: Maybe, but it looks too small. I think [1]I will have the baked potato because it comes with salad[/1]. || Boy: Good choice. I will order after you. || Girl: Great, then we can find a table near the window before it gets busy. || Girl: That should make the rest of the day much easier.

questions.context: You hear a school announcement about the photography club.
questions.audio_script: Speaker: This is a message for students joining the photography club today. Please do not go to the art room, because students are taking an exam there. Some students may wait by the library, but it closes early today. The teacher has changed the room for today only. [1]Everyone should go straight to the science lab after lunch[/1]. Please arrive on time, because the activity will begin as soon as the register is checked. You do not need to bring any extra equipment.

dialogue.speaker: speaker
dialogue.text: This is a message for students joining the photography club today. Please do not go to the art room, because students are taking an exam there. Some students may wait by the library, but it closes early today. The teacher has changed the room for today only. Everyone should go straight to the science lab after lunch. Please arrive on time, because the activity will begin as soon as the register is checked. You do not need to bring any extra equipment.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about travelling to the gallery.
questions.audio_script: Woman: How are you getting to the gallery tomorrow? I thought you were going to walk. || Girl: I was, but it is farther than I thought. || Woman: Could you use the bus instead? || Girl: I checked, but the next one is too late. [1]I am going to take the train because it stops close to the entrance[/1]. || Woman: That sounds sensible. I will meet you near the entrance when you arrive. || Girl: Great. I will send a message if I am late. || Girl: That should make the rest of the day much easier.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about work in a bookshop.
questions.audio_script: Man: What are you doing at the bookshop this afternoon? I thought the manager asked you to clean the windows. || Boy: Not now, because Sam did that before lunch. || Man: So will you carry boxes upstairs? || Boy: No, the lift is not working. The manager said [1]my job today is to put new books on the shelves[/1]. || Man: That sounds clear enough. || Boy: Yes, and it should not take too long if the shop stays quiet. I can help you afterwards. || Boy: That should make the rest of the day much easier.
